subcodes.first_line: O ardent lover of the beauteous face of Truth! This earthen sphere is but a nest for earthbound birds and creatures of darkness; therefore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شیدای روی دلجوی حق این کره خاک آشیان مرغ خاکی و پرنده ظلمانیست لهذا
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for the departed, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
